mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO weapon_pool_record ( id, role_id, pool_id, pool_name, weapon_id, weapon_name, weapon_type, rarity, is_new, gacha_ts, seq_id, lang, server_id ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.poolId}, #{item.poolName}, #{item.weaponId}, #{item.weaponName}, #{item.weaponType}, #{item.rarity}, #{item.new}, #{item.gachaTs}, #{item.seqId}, #{item.lang}, #{item.serverId} )
